## Description
Provide a clear summary of what this pull request does and why.  
Include any relevant context or references to issues.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug Fix
- [ ] Documentation Update

- [ ] Other (please specify):

## Checklist
- [ ] Code compiles successfully
- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Branch name follows convention (`feature/phase3-files-[name]`)
- [ ] Reviewer assigned
- [ ] No merge conflicts

## Screenshots (if applicable)
Attach screenshots or logs that help explain your changes.

## Additional Notes
Add any extra comments or details for reviewers here.
